test.create_query: CREATE TABLE t_text_index_analysis ( s String, INDEX idx_s (s) TYPE text(tokenizer = 'splitByNonAlpha') ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple() SETTINGS index_granularity = 1
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO t_text_index_analysis SELECT concat('common ', 'medium' || intDiv(number, 1000), ' rare' || number) FROM numbers(1000000)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM t_text_index_analysis WHERE hasAllTokens(s, 'common')
SELECT count() FROM t_text_index_analysis WHERE hasAllTokens(s, 'medium789')
SELECT count() FROM t_text_index_analysis WHERE hasAllTokens(s, 'rare123456')
SELECT count() FROM t_text_index_analysis WHERE hasAllTokens(s, 'nonexistent')
SELECT count() FROM t_text_index_analysis WHERE hasAllTokens(s, 'common medium789')
SELECT count() FROM t_text_index_analysis WHERE hasAllTokens(s, 'common rare123456')
SELECT count() FROM t_text_index_analysis WHERE hasAllTokens(s, 'medium789 rare123456')
SELECT count() FROM t_text_index_analysis WHERE hasAnyTokens(s, 'medium789 rare123456')
